---
name: klingon-empire-brand-guidelines
description: "tlhIngan wo' nguvmey, mu' mIw, 'ej leghlu'bogh Deghmey narghmoH; wo' batlh, chargh, tay, 'ej chuQun no' 'angnISbogh Hoch qachmeyDaq lo'. Degh nguvmey, mIw ra'mey, legh mIwmey, tuq Degh ghom, qoj SeQ ren patmey poHlu'DI', poHvam yIlo'."
license: "mung naQ LICENSE.txtDaq tu'lu'."
---

# tlhIngan wo' Degh mIwmey

## Del

batlh, chargh, tay, 'ej chuQun no' Dacha' botlh tIn qo'. tlhIngan wo' leghlu'bogh DeghmeyDaj SeQ, qu', 'ej SuvwI' rur; may'mo' Qopta'bogh 'uSqanmey, 'Iw Doqmey, tuq joqwI'mey nguvmey, 'ej no' bov SuvwI' tayqeq tIn 'angbogh qul wov je ghom.

tlhIngan wo' Deghmey 'ej mIwmeyvaD poHvam yIlo'.

**mu'mey potlh**: Degh, wo' Degh, 'IH mIw, nguvmey, ngutlh tu'qom, tlhIngan wo', qu' ren, SeQ ren, tIn ren, tuq Degh, Deghmey, joqwI'mey, legh mIw

## Degh ra'mey

### nguvmey

**wo' botlh nguvmey:**

- wo' Doq: `#7A0C14` - Degh botlh nguv; 'Iw, noH, 'anmoHghach, 'ej wo' woQ 'ang
- veS qIj: `#111111` - botlh nguv; may' Sut, logh, qu', 'ej ra' 'ang
- mItlhlu'bogh ghav 'uSqan: `#6E7378` - cha'DIch botlh nguv; nuHmey, Dujmey, mItlh HoS, 'ej patlh 'ang
- ngo' jey' Sorpuq: `#8A6A2B` - SeQ lurDech, ngo' wo' batlh, 'ej Qopbogh wo' 'uSqan 'ang
- Hom no' bov tetlh: `#D8C9A3` - ngo' paqmey, ghItlhta'bogh nagh, ngo' joqwI'mey, 'ej motlhbe' Daqmey 'ang
- mItlhmeH qul qulHom: `#B64A1A` - qul, tuj, qu', mItlhmeH pa', 'ej noH HoS 'ang

**Deghmey 'ej joqwI'meyvaD latlh nguvmey:**

- yay qol'om: `#D6A63A` - Degh botlh 'ay'mey, batlh, patlh, 'ej yay 'ang
- qulDaq pubtaHbogh qol'om: `#F0C14B` - wovbogh qol'om; Deghmey, Hovmey, 'ej wo' 'angghachvaD
- nuH SIrlIy: `#A0A6AD` - bIrbogh 'uSqan nguv; nuHmey, ghevmey, 'ej noH DeghmeyvaD
- quv 'uSqan Hurgh: `#4E5257` - Hurghbogh 'uSqan nguv; Qur, botlh ghev, 'ej qu' chenmoHghachvaD
- joqwI' Doq Hurgh: `#5C0F18` - tuq joqwI'mey 'ej SeQ tuq DeghmeyvaD Doq Hurgh
- tay Doq wov: `#A61E22` - patlh nIv Deghmey 'ej qu' botlh 'ay'meyvaD Doq wov
- may'Daq raghta'bogh 'uSqan: `#7B4A2A` - Qopbogh may' Sut, raghta'bogh 'uSqan, 'ej ngo' may' De' 'ang
- qo'rIn DIr rur nguv: `#6A4A2F` - tlheghmey, joqwI' yIchmey, 'ej Qopbogh SeQ porghmeyvaD
- tuq patmor: `#1F6A3A` - patlh, no' 'ISyar, 'ej tuq latlh 'ang
- joqwI' patmor wov: `#2E8B57` - le' tuq Degh 'ay'meyvaD patmor wov
- SuD Hurgh: `#1E4E7A` - motlhbe' 'ach HoS; Duj patlh qoj tuq DeghvaD lo'laH
- yejquv SuD wov: `#5D87B3` - wovbogh tay SuD; patlh nIv DaqmeyvaD qoj latlh nguvmey DanuQmeH
- ta' Ho'ya': `#F0E7D8` - chISqu' nguv; botlh 'ay'mey, ghItlh, 'ej qIj DaqmeyDaq ghItlhmeyvaD

### Degh 'angghach

- qu', batlh ghaj, 'ej ghIjmoHbogh
- bov tIQ rur 'ach noH HoS ghaj
- Hab'e' qaq law' SeQ'e' qaq puS
- mItlhlu'ta'bogh 'ej taqbogh; Say' 'ej chu' rurbe'
- qu' 'ach pat ghaj; way'ar lo'be'
- Hem, SeQ, 'ej batlh 'Ip ghaj

### ngutlh tu'qom

- botlh pongmeyvaD, ghItlhlu'ta'bogh nagh rur, noH rur, tIn 'ej HoSghaj ngutlh tu'qom yIlo'
- nItbogh ghItlhmeyvaD, laDlaHlu'bogh 'ach SaHbe'bogh ngutlh tu'qom yIlo'
- botlh pong ngutlh tu'qom woQ ghaj, qun ghaj, 'ej SeQ nIS
- rutlhbogh qoj jup rur ngechmey qaq law'; HoSghaj 'ej tajvajHom jejbogh ngutlhmey qaq puSbe'
- Habbogh, QuchmoHbogh, lut botlhbogh, qoj malja' jup rur ngutlh tu'qom yIlo'Qo'

## le' mIwmey

### mu' mIw

- SeQ
- ra'wI' rur
- Hem
- bov tIQ rur
- qu'
- bom rur 'ach jej
- ra' QIn, 'Ip, ghuHmoH QIn, qoj batlh rIchwIn rur nIS
- QuchmoHbogh, Habbogh, qoj malja' jup rur nISbe'

### legh mIw

- qIj 'ej qu' nguv pat HoSghaj yIlo'
- wo' Doq, qIj, mItlhlu'bogh 'uSqanmey, 'ej tuq Degh patmor qoj SuD nguvmey yIghom
- Daqmey mItlhlu'ta'bogh, ghItlhlu'ta'bogh, Qopbogh, qoj may'Daq taHta'bogh rur nIS; Say' 'ej chu' rur nISbe'
- tajvajHom jejmey, 'etlhmey, tuq Deghmey, joqwI'mey, 'uSqan rur, 'ej ngechmey tIn yImaS
- patmey 'ej 'angghachmey Qur ghaj, ra'bogh, 'ej renwI' Qach rur nIS
- Deghvam puS rur nISbe'; Hab rur nISbe'; chu' rur nISbe'

### porgh mIwmey

- ghav 'uSqan
- mupwI'mo' QIHta'bogh jey' Sorpuq
- Qopta'bogh qol'om
- Degh nguvmey
- joqwI' weSjech
- ghItlhta'bogh nagh
- qo'rIn DIr 'ej may'mo' Qopbogh DIr rur

### tu'qommey

**lo':**

- tajvajHom jejmey
- 'etlhmey
- botjanmey
- tuq Deghmey
- ra'Duchmey
- gho Deghmey
- notcha' joqwI'mey
- ghev jejmey

**yIlo'Qo':**

- Qungbogh po'oHmey
- QuchmoHbogh patmey
- Habbogh chej nguvmey, chay' qul qoj 'uSqan rurbe'chugh
- Doqqu' qoj chISqu' nguvmey
- chu' DIm bIQHa' rur ren

### mIllogh ngoQ

- 'ejDomey
- nuHmey
- joqwI'mey 'ej Deghmey
- tuqmey 'ej tuq Deghmey
- may' Daqmey
- qul wov
- may' Sut
- nagh, 'uSqan, 'ej tay janmey

## De' po'mey

### nguv pat chenmoHghach

- nguv patvam wa' wo' Degh botlhDaq chenbogh wo' 'angnIS; tuqmey, 'obe'mey, Deghmey, 'ej joqwI'mey je muvmoHlaH
- Hoch leghlu'laHmeH, botlh wo' nguv ghom HoSghaj yIlo'
- tuq 'ej 'obe' nguvmey pat tInmoHnIS; 'ach wo' botlh qu' 'ej noH Daq puSmoH nISbe'

### nguv lo'meH ra'mey

**patlh wa': wo' botlh**

- wo' Doq
- veS qIj
- mItlhlu'bogh ghav 'uSqan
- yay qol'om

**patlh cha': SeQ 'ej porgh boQ**

- ngo' jey' Sorpuq
- quv 'uSqan Hurgh
- Hom no' bov tetlh
- ta' Ho'ya'
- may'Daq raghta'bogh 'uSqan

**patlh wej: tuq 'ej 'obe' botlh nguvmey**

- tuq patmor
- joqwI' patmor wov
- SuD Hurgh
- yejquv SuD wov
- tay Doq wov
- joqwI' Doq Hurgh

### nguv lo'ghach

- leghbogh botlh Daq chenmoHmeH, wo' Doq je veS qIj je yIlo'
- Qur, may' Sut, ghev, 'ej noH DaqmeyvaD mItlhlu'bogh ghav 'uSqan, quv 'uSqan Hurgh, 'ej nuH SIrlIy yIlo'
- Deghmey, patlh Deghmey, Hovmey, 'ej wo' potlh 'angmeH yay qol'om je qulDaq pubtaHbogh qol'om je yIlo'
- lurDech, Qopbogh porghmey, motlhbe' De'mey, 'ej SeQ botlhDaq ngo' jey' Sorpuq, may'Daq raghta'bogh 'uSqan, 'ej qo'rIn DIr rur nguv yIlo'
- Hom no' bov tetlh 'ej ta' Ho'ya' puS yIlo'; qIj DaqmeyDaq ghItlh, botlh 'ay'mey, ghItlhta'bogh Daqmey, 'ej wovlaHmeH
- tuq patmor, joqwI' patmor wov, SuD Hurgh, 'ej yejquv SuD wov puS yIlo'; tuq, 'obe', qoj SeQ latlh 'angmeH
- mItlhmeH qul qulHom 'ej tay Doq wov tInbe' yIlo'; tujmoHmeH, botlh 'ay'meyvaD, qu' 'angmeH, qoj mItlh HoS 'angmeH

### ngutlh tu'qom lo'ghach

- botlh pong ngutlh tu'qom woQ ghaj, qun ghaj, 'ej SeQ nIS
- porgh ghItlh ngutlh tu'qom laDlaHlu'nIS 'ach mu' SeQ 'e' choHHa'Qo'
- HoS, Daqmey, 'ej tIn/machmeyDaq botlh pong pat yIpol; Habbogh 'IH lo'Qo'
- botlh pongmey, Deghmey, 'ej wo' pongmeyvaD, ngutlh tIn qoj ngutlh mach botlhbogh mIwmey yImaS

### QIn

**qIj, Doq, mItlhlu'bogh 'uSqanmey, 'ej tuq nguvmey botlh nguv pat wIlo'. legh mI'wIj SeQ, qu', 'ej batlh ghaj; may'mo' Qopbogh porghmey, jej Deghmey, 'ej tuq joqwI' nguvmey je wIghom. mu'wIj ra'bogh, SeQbogh, 'ej no' rur.**

### Hoch Del

Deghvam **batlhmo' chenmoHlu'bogh wo'** rur nIS; leghlu'bogh pat botlh botlhDaq woQ, tuq Deghmey, Deghmey, 'ej SeQ potlh je qaw'meH tIn, 'ach qu' 'ej patlh choHHa'be'.
